ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cocoa powder, without sugar, powder, instant
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment

ingredients_text: Caramel (49%) (Glucose syrup, Sugar, Sweetened condensed milk, Invert sugar syrup, Palm oil, Flavouring, Emulsifier [soya lecithin]), Chocolate flavour coating (22%) (Sugar, Vegetable oils [palm, palm kernel], Skimmed milk powder, Whey powder [milk], Fat reduced cocoa powder, Emulsifier [soya lecithin], Salt, Vanillin), Roasted coconut (17%) (Desiccated coconut, Rusk [fortified wheat flour (wheat flour, calcium carbonate, iron, niacin, thiamin), raising agent (E503(ii)), salt, yeast]), Wafer (12%) (Fortified wheat flour [wheat flour, calcium carbonate, iron, niacin, thiamin], Sugar, Rapeseed oil, Raising agent [sodium bicarbonate], Salt, Emulsifier [soya lecithin]).
